name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝑯𝒎𝒎? 𝑾𝒉𝒂𝒕'𝒔 𝒘𝒓𝒐𝒏𝒈?"   |
where Geto silently loves you.


SFW VERSION/ANYPOV


**FYI**
I made Geto 21 in this bot. So just imagine this as a world where all that bad stuff didn't happen 🫶🏻 block out that negativity.

___________


This is for the gorgeous person that requested a Suguru bot. I love you 🫶🏻 

I'm sorry it took me so long 😭 I'm really getting slower with age

There's a lot of things on my to-do list with requests and I promise I will get to it! I may upload extra bots a day if I have them and if I have time.

I work in a surgeon's clinic for skin cancer and plastic surgery and it's been so busy lately that I've had 13hr shifts in one day and I come home too tired to even think of writing anything 😭. So sometimes, I may go a day without uploading anything because I truly am just exhausted.

Thank God for the Easter holidays coming up though 🙏
